title: Survive and Thrive
description: Pack that revolves around the idea of longevity.
body:
# Survive and Thrive
This mod pack was built with a goal of not having a bunch of different mods cover the same thing, this allows for less confusion and frustration and an easier time for people to stick around

The main highlights of this pack are
- **The Thermal Series** 
  - This covers the technological, agricultural, and armor aspect of this modpack
- **Ars Nouveau**
  - The magic side of the pack
- **Yung's Mods**
  - Better structures for the vanilla biomes
- **Macaw's Mods**
  - More building blocks
- **Majrusz's Mods**
  - Scaling difficulty

There are a lot of other mods as well, but those are the main highlights. There are a good number of mob mods, exploration mods, QOL mods. Hope you enjoy!


## Curseforge Credits
#### **FTB Mods**
- [FTB Ultimine](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-ultimine-forge)
- [FTB Teams](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-teams-forge)
- [FTB Chunks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-chunks-forge)
- [FTB Essentials](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-essentials-forge)
#### **Sophisticated Mods**
- [Sophisticated Backpacks by P3pp3rF1y](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sophisticated-backpacks)
- [Sophisticated Storage by P3pp3rF1y](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sophisticated-storage)
